name: Sophia Loren's Pizza
recipeIngredient: Your favorite toppings (e.g., Anchovies, Cheese, Sliced Ripe Olives, Tomato sauce, Pizza sauce, sliced Sausages, Mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the directions on the box of any packaged roll or pizza mix.
2. When the dough has risen, knead in as much yellow corn meal as it will take.
3. Grease your pizza pan, cookie sheet, or large pie pan with olive oil or vegetable oil.
4. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and press into the pan.
5. Pour more oil on top and spread it over the surface of the dough.
6. Add your favorite toppings: Anchovies, Cheese, Sliced Ripe Olives, Tomato sauce, Pizza sauce, sliced Sausages, Mushrooms.
7. Season with your preferred spices: Marjoram, Rosemary, Thyme, or Oregano.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes in a hot oven (425°F).
9. Cut into wedges and serve with guests' fingers.
